title: Thermo EASY-nLC + Q Exactive: peptide LC-MS/MS (kit)
description: Paired nano-LC gradient and Q Exactive MS/MS setup for bottom-up peptide LC-MS/MS (Thermo app note 21550). Instantiates both leaf methods together.

payload.description: A combination kit that bundles the matching LC gradient and MS setup for bottom-up peptide LC-MS/MS on a Thermo EASY-nLC 1200 feeding a Q Exactive Orbitrap. Sample flows LC then MS: component 0 is the reversed-phase nano-LC gradient, component 1 is the data-dependent MS/MS acquisition setup. Each component keeps its own source provenance. Representative starting-point methods, verify against the source and tune per instrument and sample.
